name: Electronic Learning Tablet with Light Soft Handle Bilingual - Gigglescape™
description:
This Electronic Learning Tablet with Light Soft Handle Bilingual from Gigglescape™ makes learning fun, easy, colorful and musical for your little one. Designed like a vibrant tablet, this bilingual learning toy teaches in English and Spanish. It offers four touch-activated ways for your little one to learn — identifying letters and numbers, recognizing words and objects, engaging in question-and-answer sessions with guessing games, and exploring music-based learning. Plus, it comes with a soft handle for easy portability and convenient on-the-go education.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
